## Summary

Describe the change and the production/API impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] Ruff lint passes locally
- [ ] Ruff format check passes locally
- [ ] Mypy passes locally
- [ ] Pytest passes locally
- [ ] OpenAPI contract stays valid when API surface changes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or generated artifacts are included
- [ ] Dependency changes were reviewed for security/licensing impact
- [ ] Docs/config/env examples were updated if behavior changed
